perturbation.original_text: 1. TERM OF AGREEMENT 1.1 The term of this Agreement shall commence on the date hereof and terminate upon the conclusion of the week following the conclusion of the Dolphins 2000 regular season or post season, if applicable (the "Term" or "Initial Term"). However, this Agreement may be earlier terminated in accordance with the provisions hereof.
perturbation.changed_text: 1. TERM OF AGREEMENT 1.1 The term of this Agreement shall commence on the date hereof and terminate upon the conclusion of the week following the conclusion of the Dolphins 2000 regular season or post season, if applicable (the "Term" or "Initial Term"). However, this Agreement may be earlier terminated in accordance with the provisions hereof. Notwithstanding the foregoing, the Dolphins reserve the right to extend the Term of this Agreement by up to one additional year, upon written notice to Hydron no later than thirty (30) days prior to the originally scheduled termination date.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a contradiction regarding the "Term" of the agreement. Section 1.1 initially defines a fixed term concluding after the 2000 season. However, the addition of the clause, allows the Dolphins to unilaterally extend this term, creates uncertainty about the actual duration of the contract and contradicting the original definition of the Term.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 1. TERM OF AGREEMENT 1.1 The term of this Agreement shall commence on the date hereof and terminate upon the conclusion of the week following the conclusion of the Dolphins 2000 regular season or post season, if applicable (the "Term" or "Initial Term"). However, this Agreement may be earlier terminated in accordance with the provisions hereof. Notwithstanding the foregoing, the Dolphins reserve the right to extend the Term of this Agreement by up to one additional year, upon written notice to Hydron no later than thirty (30) days prior to the originally scheduled termination date.
perturbation.justification: The original text defines the 'Term' with a specific endpoint. The changed text introduces a unilateral extension option for the Dolphins, which contradicts the initial definition of the 'Term' as fixed. This creates an in-text contradiction as to the actual length of the agreement, making the 'Term' ambiguous. The contradicted text is the same as the Changed Text, as it overwrites the original definition.

perturbation.original_text: 2.2 For the Term of this Agreement, Hydron shall be designated as a sponsor of the Dolphins in the Sunscreen/Skin Care Category (as defined below) and a licensee of the Marks (as defined below) in the Sunscreen/Skin Category by the Dolphins. For purposes of this Agreement, the term "Sunscreen/Skin Care Category" means the product category consisting of sunscreen, sun protection and similar skin care products.
perturbation.changed_text: 2.2 For the Term of this Agreement, Hydron shall be designated as a sponsor of the Dolphins in the Sunscreen/Skin Care Category (as defined below) and a licensee of the Marks (as defined below) in the Sunscreen/Skin Category by the Dolphins. For purposes of this Agreement, the term "Sunscreen/Skin Care Category" means the product category consisting of sunscreen, sun protection, anti-aging creams, and other similar skin care products, as determined solely by the Dolphins.
perturbation.explanation: The original definition of "Sunscreen/Skin Care Category" is relatively specific. By adding ", as determined solely by the Dolphins," the modified definition grants the Dolphins broad and unilateral discretion to expand the category, contradicting the original intent and scope. This creates uncertainty and a potential for abuse, as the Dolphins could include products not initially contemplated, impacting Hydron's exclusivity and sponsorship benefits.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 2.2 For the Term of this Agreement, Hydron shall be designated as a sponsor of the Dolphins in the Sunscreen/Skin Care Category (as defined below) and a licensee of the Marks (as defined below) in the Sunscreen/Skin Category by the Dolphins. For purposes of this Agreement, the term "Sunscreen/Skin Care Category" means the product category consisting of sunscreen, sun protection, anti-aging creams, and other similar skin care products, as determined solely by the Dolphins.
perturbation.justification: The changed text adds a unilateral right for the Dolphins to define the "Sunscreen/Skin Care Category", which contradicts the original intent of the agreement and creates potential for the Dolphins to unfairly broaden the category to Hydron's detriment. The contradiction arises because the original text implies a more fixed definition, while the changed text allows for a flexible, unilaterally determined definition. As both clauses are in the same location, they contradict each other.

perturbation.original_text: 6. REPRESENTATIONS AND WARRANTIES 6.1 Hydron represents and warrants to the Dolphins the following, all of which representations and warranties shall apply during the Term of this Agreement. (a) Hydron is a corporation in good standing under the laws of the state of New York and is duly authorized to transact business in Florida, with full power and authority to enter into and fully perform its obligations under this Agreement. The execution and delivery of this Agreement on behalf of Hydron has been duly authorized by Hydron and this Agreement constitutes a valid, binding and enforceable obligation of Hydron. (b) Neither this Agreement nor anything required to be done hereunder by Hydron violates or shall violate any corporate charter, contract or other document to which Hydron is a party or by which it is otherwise bound.
perturbation.changed_text: 6. REPRESENTATIONS AND WARRANTIES 6.1 Hydron represents and warrants to the Dolphins the following, all of which representations and warranties shall apply during the Term of this Agreement, unless Hydron provides written notification to the Dolphins of any material change in circumstances affecting such representations and warranties, in which case such representations and warranties shall be deemed modified accordingly. (a) Hydron is a corporation in good standing under the laws of the state of New York and is duly authorized to transact business in Florida, with full power and authority to enter into and fully perform its obligations under this Agreement. The execution and delivery of this Agreement on behalf of Hydron has been duly authorized by Hydron and this Agreement constitutes a valid, binding and enforceable obligation of Hydron. (b) Neither this Agreement nor anything required to be done hereunder by Hydron violates or shall violate any corporate charter, contract or other document to which Hydron is a party or by which it is otherwise bound.
perturbation.explanation: By adding the initial clause "unless Hydron provides written notification to the Dolphins of any material change in circumstances affecting such representations and warranties, in which case such representations and warranties shall be deemed modified accordingly," the representations and warranties in section 6.1 are weakened. Although Hydron represents certain warranties, the addition of that clause allows Hydron to alter its warranties by notifying Dolphins, creating uncertainty and reduces the reliability of Hydron's initial representations.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 6. REPRESENTATIONS AND WARRANTIES 6.1 Hydron represents and warrants to the Dolphins the following, all of which representations and warranties shall apply during the Term of this Agreement, unless Hydron provides written notification to the Dolphins of any material change in circumstances affecting such representations and warranties, in which case such representations and warranties shall be deemed modified accordingly. (a) Hydron is a corporation in good standing under the laws of the state of New York and is duly authorized to transact business in Florida, with full power and authority to enter into and fully perform its obligations under this Agreement. The execution and delivery of this Agreement on behalf of Hydron has been duly authorized by Hydron and this Agreement constitutes a valid, binding and enforceable obligation of Hydron. (b) Neither this Agreement nor anything required to be done hereunder by Hydron violates or shall violate any corporate charter, contract or other document to which Hydron is a party or by which it is otherwise bound.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a significant contradiction by allowing Hydron to unilaterally modify its representations and warranties through written notification. This directly undermines the reliability and enforceability of the original warranties, creating uncertainty about Hydron's obligations. The original text states that Hydron 'represents and warrants' certain conditions 'during the Term of this Agreement.' The added clause weakens this statement by allowing modifications, creating a direct conflict with the initial intent and creating uncertainty. The contradicted text is the same changed text, demonstrating that the added clause directly impacts and diminishes the strength of the original representations and warranties within the same section, leading to an in-text contradiction as defined by Structural Flaws.
